title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Housing.com

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Housing.com
jsonLd.description:
Housing.com has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
